{{Quote|My skills are yours to command.|Anonymous Defiler|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
'''Defilers''' were [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] employed as "undercover [[Agent/Legends|agents]]" of [[Tyber Zann]] whom he dispatched to various [[Star system/Legends|systems]] to promote [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] and [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]], moreover known as "corruption". Defilers would travel to [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] systems during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and would sabotage bases, set up connections with the [[Black market/Legends|black market]], set up [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] camps, steal [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], etc. Throughout the war, defilers became a substantial source of stress and frustration due to their constant raids. Essentially, what they were most familiar for was spreading the influence of Tyber Zann.

==History==
[[File:Defilers-FoC.jpg|thumb|left|180px|A group of Defilers.]]

Though the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] possessed a surprisingly well-equipped and organized military force, they generally preferred to use guerrilla warfare tactics or criminal activities to gain influence.

The Defiler's main purpose was to spread [[Tyber Zann]]'s "corruption" throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Many or all of them were brainwashed to only serve the Consortium. They were essentially the criminal equivalent of the [[Infiltrators/Legends|infiltrators]] employed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

Defilers were made up of many different [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Species/Legends|species]], trained and conditioned to serve Tyber Zann above all others and concealed under a distinctive uniform of [[Color/Legends|red]] [[Armor/Legends|armor]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Defilers were sent to numerous [[Planet/Legends|planets]] to achieve Zann's goals, often working alongside such infamous individuals as [[Urai Fen]], [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88]], [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], and [[Silri]]. The Defilers were always housed in the [[Consortium palace]], where they would be trained for their tasks. Many defilers served as Zann's most public representatives, as they committed acts of [[Saboteur/Legends|sabotage]], kidnapping, bribery, and other [[:Category:Crime|illegal]] activities. They were capable of setting up illegal [[Casino/Legends|casinos]] as part of [[racketeering]] operations. When necessary, they also participated in Zann's more covert military actions.

==Weapons and equipment==
[[File:Defilers-RECG.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Defilers fire on an [[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|All Terrain Anti-Aircraft]]]]
Defilers were usually armed with a precise [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]] and [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]], and preferred long-range combat. They worked well with the [[Droideka Mark II]] in destroying heavier vehicles, and could use their thermal detonators to kill entire [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]]. In close combat, they tended to suffer against species such as [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]], whose brute strength allowed them to rip off a Defiler's [[Limb/Legends|arms]].

The defilers generally worked in secret because of personal security. When most defilers finished their assignment, they would never appear in the Zann Consortium again, taking no risk on being recognized by any [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|security forces]]. There were, however, a few exceptions.

==Behind the scenes==
The Defilers were voiced by [[Steve Blum]], who also voices the Empire [[Heads-up display/Legends|HUD]].
